Serialisierte Form

  • Package model.dungeon

    • Klasse model.dungeon.Dungeon

      class Dungeon extends Object implements Serializable
      serialVersionUID:
      1L

      • Serialisierte Felder

        • rooms
          Room[][] rooms
          Two-dimensional grid of rooms representing the dungeon layout.

    • Datensatzklasse model.dungeon.Exit

      class Exit extends Record implements Serializable
      serialVersionUID:
      1L

      • Serialisierte Felder

        • direction
          Direction direction
          Das Feld für die Datensatzkomponente direction.
        • target
          Room target
          Das Feld für die Datensatzkomponente target.

    • Klasse model.dungeon.Room

      class Room extends Object implements Serializable
      serialVersionUID:
      1L

      • Serialisierte Felder

        • exits
          Map<Direction,Exit> exits
          The exits leading from this room, mapped by their direction.

  • Package model.entity

    • Klasse model.entity.Enemy

      class Enemy extends Entity implements Serializable
      serialVersionUID:
      1L

      • Serialisierte Felder

        • damage
          int damage
          The damage value dealt by this enemy.
        • defense
          int defense
          The defense value of this enemy.
        • imagename
          String imagename
          The image name associated with this enemy.

    • Klasse model.entity.Entity

      class Entity extends Object implements Serializable
      serialVersionUID:
      1L

      • Serialisierte Felder

        • health
          int health
          The current health of the entity.
        • maxHealth
          int maxHealth
          The maximum health of the entity.
        • name
          String name
          The name of the entity.

    • Klasse model.entity.Player

      class Player extends Entity implements Serializable
      serialVersionUID:
      1L

      • Serialisierte Felder

        • currentRoom
          Room currentRoom
          The room the player is currently located in.
        • dungeon
          Dungeon dungeon
          The dungeon instance the player is exploring.
        • equipment
          Map<EquipmentSlot,Item> equipment
          The currently equipped items mapped by their equipment slot.
        • facing
          Direction facing
          The direction the player is currently facing.
        • gender
          String gender
          The gender of the player.
        • inventory
          Inventory inventory
          The player's inventory containing collected items.
        • lastDirMoved
          Direction lastDirMoved
          The direction of the last movement performed by the player. Used for mechanics such as fleeing.
        • x
          int x
          The player's x-coordinate in the dungeon grid.
        • y
          int y
          The player's y-coordinate in the dungeon grid.

      class Consumable extends Item implements Serializable

      serialVersionUID:
      1L

      • Serialisierte Felder

        • items
          Map<Item,Integer> items

    • Klasse model.items.Item

      class Item extends Object implements Serializable
      serialVersionUID:
      1L

      • Serialisierte Felder

        • description
          String description
          A textual description of the item.
        • imagename
          String imagename
          The name of the image asset associated with this item.
        • name
          String name
          The display name of the item.
        • type
          Itemtype type
          The type classification of this item.

  • Package view

    • Klasse view.CreateNewSavePanel

      class CreateNewSavePanel extends JPanel implements Serializable
      serialVersionUID:
      1L

      • Serialisierte Felder

        • arrowLeftPanel
          ArrowPanel arrowLeftPanel
          Left arrow panel used for gender selection (female option).
        • arrowRightPanel
          ArrowPanel arrowRightPanel
          Right arrow panel used for gender selection (male option).
        • textFieldName
          JTextField textFieldName
          Text field used to enter the player's name.

    • Klasse view.GameFrame

      class GameFrame extends JFrame implements Serializable
      serialVersionUID:
      1L

      • Serialisierte Felder

        • cardLayout
          CardLayout cardLayout
          Layout manager used to switch between different screens (cards).
        • cards
          JPanel cards
          Container panel that holds all screens managed by the CardLayout.
        • gameIsRunning
          boolean gameIsRunning
          Indicates whether a game session is currently running.
        • isFighting
          boolean isFighting
          Indicates whether a battle is currently active.
        • menuBar
          JMenuBar menuBar
          Menu bar used for the in-game pause menu (status, inventory, options).
        • musicPlayer
          MusicPlayer musicPlayer
          Music player responsible for background music and menu themes.
        • window
          GameWindow window
          Reference to the active game window.

      class MainMenu extends JPanel implements Serializable
      serialVersionUID:
      1L

      class BattleView extends JPanel implements Serializable

        • battleMenuPanel

      • Serialisierte Felder

        • enemyOnePanel
          EnemyPanel enemyOnePanel
          UI panel for the first enemy.
        • enemyThreePanel
          EnemyPanel enemyThreePanel
          UI panel for the third enemy (if present).
        • enemyTwoPanel
          EnemyPanel enemyTwoPanel
          UI panel for the second enemy (if present).

      class EnemyPanel extends JPanel implements Serializable
      serialVersionUID:
      1L

      • Serialisierte Felder

        • enemy
          Enemy enemy
          The enemy entity associated with this panel.
        • healthBar
          HealthBar healthBar
          The health bar UI component showing the enemy's current health.

  • Package view.gamewindow

    • Klasse view.gamewindow.DungeonPanel

      class DungeonPanel extends JPanel implements Serializable
      serialVersionUID:
      1L

      • Serialisierte Felder

        • currentDungeonImage
          BufferedImage currentDungeonImage
          The currently rendered dungeon image.
        • dungeonImage
          DungeonImage dungeonImage
          Renderer responsible for generating dungeon images.

    • Klasse view.gamewindow.GameWindow

      class GameWindow extends JPanel implements Serializable
      serialVersionUID:
      1L

      • Serialisierte Felder

        • dungeonPanel
          DungeonPanel dungeonPanel
          Panel responsible for rendering the current dungeon room and player perspective.
        • frame
          GameFrame frame
          Reference to the main application frame used for navigation and screen management.
        • game
          Game game
          Current game instance containing the player, dungeon, items, and game state.
        • healthBar
          HealthBar healthBar
          Health bar displaying the player's current and maximum health.

  • Package view.pausemenu

    • Klasse view.pausemenu.EquipmentPanel

      class EquipmentPanel extends JPanel implements Serializable
      serialVersionUID:
      1L

      • Serialisierte Felder

        • accessoryImage
          BufferedImage accessoryImage
          Image representing the currently equipped accessory item.
        • armorImage
          BufferedImage armorImage
          Image representing the currently equipped armor item.
        • headwearImage
          BufferedImage headwearImage
          Image representing the currently equipped headwear item.
        • weaponImage
          BufferedImage weaponImage
          Image representing the currently equipped weapon item.

    • Klasse view.pausemenu.EquipmentSelectionDialog

      class EquipmentSelectionDialog extends JDialog implements Serializable
      serialVersionUID:
      1L

      • Serialisierte Felder

        • selectedValue
          Item selectedValue
          The item selected by the user for equipping.

          This value is null if the user chose to unequip instead.

        • unequipping
          boolean unequipping
          Indicates whether the user selected the unequip action.

          If true, the dialog result indicates that the currently equipped item should be removed.

    • Klasse view.pausemenu.ExitConfirmationDialog

      class ExitConfirmationDialog extends JDialog implements Serializable
      serialVersionUID:
      1L

      • Serialisierte Felder

        • exit
          boolean exit
          Indicates whether the user confirmed the exit action.

          This value is set to true when the user clicks "OK" and false when the user cancels the dialog.

    • Klasse view.pausemenu.InventoryScreen

      class InventoryScreen extends JPanel implements Serializable
      serialVersionUID:
      1L

    • Klasse view.pausemenu.OptionScreen

      class OptionScreen extends JPanel implements Serializable
      serialVersionUID:
      1L

      • Serialisierte Felder

        • btnLoad
          JButton btnLoad
          Button used to load a previously saved game.
        • btnSave
          JButton btnSave
          Button used to save the current game progress.

    • Klasse view.pausemenu.StatsPanel

      class StatsPanel extends JPanel implements Serializable
      serialVersionUID:
      1L

      • Serialisierte Felder

          Label displaying the player's current physical attack value.
        • lblDefenceAmount

        • lblHealthAmount
          JLabel lblHealthAmount
          Label displaying the player's current and maximum health.
